basic_details.job_title: APSSB CGLE 2026 Stenography Admit Card – Hall Ticket Available 22–28 June 2026
basic_details.short_information: This section provides a quick reference summary of all key dates and details related to the APSSB CGLE 2026 Stenography Proficiency Test Admit Card, as officially notified by the Board on 12 June 2026. Download APSSB CGLE 2026 Stenography Admit Card

important_instructions: The Arunachal Pradesh Staff Selection Board (APSSB) has officially announced the release of Admit Cards for the Stenography Proficiency Test under the Combined Graduate Level Examination (CGLE) 2026. Candidates who have qualified for this stage can download their hall tickets from the official APSSB portal starting 22 June 2026 at 11:00 AM. The download window closes on 28 June 2026 at 03:00 PM. Read on for all essential details, including the download process, complaint deadline, and important notes for candidates.
TelegramJob alerts channel Join WhatsAppInstant updates Join InstagramDaily posts Follow Add FJA on As Preferred Source

The APSSB has issued specific advisory notes along with the admit card announcement. Every candidate appearing for the Stenography Proficiency Test should carefully follow these instructions to avoid any inconvenience on the day of the examination.

Download early: Do not wait until the last day to download your admit card. Technical issues or high server traffic near the deadline could prevent access. Save a hard copy: Print and retain a physical copy of the admit card well in advance of the exam date. Verify details: Immediately after downloading, verify all personal and exam-related details mentioned on the hall ticket. Report discrepancies promptly: If any error is found, report it to APSSB before the 26 June 2026 deadline at 04:00 PM. Carry valid ID proof: Along with the admit card, bring an original government-issued photo ID to the exam venue.

faq.question: Q1. When will the APSSB CGLE 2026 Stenography Admit Card be released?
faq.answer: The APSSB CGLE 2026 Stenography Proficiency Test Admit Card will be available for download from 22 June 2026 at 11:00 AM until 28 June 2026 at 03:00 PM on the official portal at www.apssb.nic.in.

faq.question: Q2. Where can I download the APSSB CGLE 2026 Steno Admit Card?
faq.answer: Candidates can download the admit card by logging into the official APSSB website at www.apssb.nic.in using their registered login credentials.

faq.question: Q3. What is the last date to download the APSSB CGLE 2026 Stenography Hall Ticket?
faq.answer: The last date to download the admit card is 28 June 2026 at 03:00 PM. Candidates are advised to download it well before the deadline.

faq.question: Q4. By when should I report complaints about my APSSB admit card?
faq.answer: Any issues or complaints regarding the admit card must be reported by 04:00 PM on 26 June 2026. Complaints received after this deadline may not be addressed.

faq.question: Q5. What should I do if there is an error on my APSSB CGLE 2026 Admit Card?
faq.answer: If you find any discrepancy on your admit card, immediately report it to the APSSB through the official channel before 4:00 PM on 26 June 2026. Do not appear for the exam with an incorrect admit card without raising the complaint first.
